2603.13447.title: MGMAR: Metal-Guided Metal Artifact Reduction for X-ray Computed Tomography
2603.13447.paper_summary: An X-ray computed tomography (CT), metal artifact reduction (MAR) remains a major challenge because metallic implants violate standard CT forward-model assumptions, producing severe streaking and shadowing artifacts that degrade diagnostic quality. We propose MGMAR, a metal-guided MAR method that explicitly leverages metal-related information throughout the reconstruction pipeline. MGMAR first generates a high-quality prior image by training a conditioned implicit neural representation (INR) using metal-unaffected projections, and then incorporates this prior into a normalized MAR (NMAR) framework for projection completion. To improve robustness under severe metal corruption, we pretrain the encoder-conditioned INR on paired metal-corrupted and artifact-free CT images, thereby embedding data-driven prior knowledge into the INR parameter space. This prior-embedded initialization reduces sensitivity to random initialization and accelerates convergence during measurement-specific refinement. The encoder takes a metal-corrupted reconstruction together with a recursively constructed metal artifact image, enabling the latent field to capture metal-dependent global artifact patterns. After projection completion using the INR prior, we further suppress residual artifacts using a metal-conditioned correction network, where the metal mask modulates intermediate features via adaptive instance normalization to target metal-dependent secondary artifacts while preserving anatomical structures. Experiments on the public AAPM-MAR benchmark demonstrate that MGMAR achieves state-of-the-art performance, attaining an average final score of 0.89 on 29 clinical test cases.
2603.13447.paper_summary_zh: X 射線電腦斷層掃描 (CT) 中的金屬伪影減少 (MAR) 仍然是一個主要挑戰，因為金屬植入物違反了標準 CT 前向模型的假設，產生嚴重的條紋和陰影伪影，降低了診斷質量。<lb/>我們提出 MGMAR，一種金屬引導的 MAR 方法，明確利用金屬相關信息來進行重建流程。<lb/>MGMAR 首先通過使用未受金屬影響的投影訓練條件隱式神經表示 (INR) 來生成高質量的先驗圖像，然後將這一先驗納入標準化 MAR (NMAR) 框架中以完成投影。<lb/>為了提高在嚴重金屬損壞下的穩健性，我們在配對的金屬損壞和無伪影的 CT 圖像上預訓練編碼器條件的 INR，從而將數據驅動的先驗知識嵌入到 INR 參數空間中。<lb/>這種嵌入先驗的初始化減少了對隨機初始化的敏感性，並加速了在特定測量下的收斂。<lb/>編碼器接受金屬損壞的重建以及遞歸構建的金屬伪影圖像，使潛在場能夠捕捉金屬依賴的全局伪影模式。<lb/>在使用 INR 先驗完成投影後，我們進一步使用金屬條件的修正網絡來抑制殘餘伪影，其中金屬掩膜通過自適應實例正規化調節中間特徵，以針對金屬依賴的次級伪影，同時保留解剖結構。<lb/>在公共 AAPM-MAR 基準上的實驗表明，MGMAR 實現了最先進的性能，在 29 個臨床測試案例中獲得了 0.89 的平均最終分數。
2603.13447.author: Hyoung Suk Park et.al.
